steps.title: Identify the shift in Darius's thinking
steps.content: The key signal is Darius's opening feeling—“I felt like a tourist”—contrasted with his closing reflection—“Maybe I wasn't such a tourist.” This shift happens as Babou fusses with his appearance, regards him with a searching look, and affirms him with “I am glad you are here.”

steps.title: Match the purpose
steps.content:
Babou's actions and words directly cause Darius to reconsider how he thinks of himself. The other choices address what the text doesn't develop:
  • A emphasizes anticipation of an event
  • B travel preferences
  • D future visits
. That matches choice C — C is correct.
